name: SetPictureBoxImage
title: SetPictureBoxImage
description: Replaces the image of the Panel Designer control during runtime:
The panel is accessed by its individual panel name that is entered in the Panel Designer.

parameters.name: panel
parameters.description: Panel name, restricted to 128 characters."" – references all loaded panelsIf you open a panel the first time, the panel is loaded. If you close the panel, it remains loaded.

parameters.name: control
parameters.description: Name of the control, restricted to 128 characters."" – references all controls on the panel.

parameters.name: iamgefile
parameters.description: Path and name of the image file.

description: Setting image file using absolute path.
Setting image file using relative path. The image is in the Images folder and this folder is parallel to the panel folder.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
